title: Boca de Ouro
writer: Nelson Pereira dos Santos, Nelson Rodrigues
actors: Jece Valadão, Odete Lara, Daniel Filho
plot: When powerful outlaw "Boca de Ouro" dies, a reporter interviews his former lover Guigui to try to outline his personality. But the woman offers him three different versions of the facts, following the changes of her own personal f...
